issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
Instructions only provide Python (PySpark) examples, not for Scala, Java, or R.

scenarios.name: etl-pipeline-parquet
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets every rubric requirement, while Response B fails to use parquet, correct revenue calculation, and full aggregation.

scenarios.name: streaming-kafka-window-count
scenarios.rationale: Response A satisfies every rubric requirement, while Response B uses 'complete' mode instead of the required 'update' mode.
